violations.description: Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of Vacuum Sealing meats. Operator to reach out to DOH for obtaining an approved HACCP plan. Current plan not yet approved. Establishment currently vacuum sealing pizzas, chicken enchiladas, raw meats, meat balls, jerky, and sticks.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Receptacles, covers/lids, adequate number, clean, insect/rodent proof, storage, frequency, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
